title: Demolitionist Villager (TNT Villager)
description: A mod that adds a demolitionist villager type with some explosive trades
body:
**Adds some TNT/firework related trades.**

Recipe:

![recipe img](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CrxQiC0p/images/053ba639a8a143904bf57d1d37de97eb728a9073.png)
<details>

  
<summary>Trades (1.2.0+)</summary>

PLEASE suggest better trades here:

GitHub: https://github.com/Logboy2000/Demolitionist-Villager-Mod/issues

**Level 1:**

1 Emerald -> 3 Gunpowder

1 Emerald -> 3 Paper

**Level 2:**

4 Emeralds -> 1 Flint and Steel

1 Emerald -> 4 Sand

**Level 3:**

5 Emeralds -> 1 TNT

6-7 Emeralds -> 1 TNT Minecart

**Level 4:**

4 Emeralds -> 1 Fire Charge

2-3 Emeralds -> 5 Firework Rockets

**Level 5:**

32-64 Emeralds -> Blast Protection V

</details>
<details>
<summary>Trades (1.0.0 - 1.1.1)</summary>

**Level 1:**

1 Emerald -> 3 Gunpowder

1 Emerald -> 3 Paper

**Level 2:**

5 Emeralds -> 1 Flint and Steel

1 Emerald -> 4 Sand

**Level 3:**

5 Emeralds -> 1 TNT

5-8 Emeralds -> 1 TNT Minecart

**Level 4:**

5 Emeralds -> 1 Fire Charge

1-3 Emeralds -> 5 Firework Rockets

**Level 5:**

64 Emeralds -> 1 Creeper Head

</details>

<details>

















  
<summary>Spooky</summary>


![face](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CrxQiC0p/images/85e56000271afcefc0910e59a1d9c7716328d41d.png)

</details>
